case_title: H & H SHIP SERVICE COMPANY, INC., A CALIF CORP vs. BAY AREA TANK REMOVAL, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: STAY OF ACTION BY DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY FILED BY PLAINTIFF H & H SHIP SERVICE COMPANY, INC., A CALIF CORP

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1996, CONTINUED TO JUN-26-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT: PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING CURRENT STATUS OF DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY CASE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-26-1996, CONTINUED TO SEP-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT: PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING CURRENT STATUS OF DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
